horoscope: Mars, the planet of action and your ruler, begins its transit of your solar third house today, dear Aries. Mars here energizes, heats up, and perhaps speeds up your communications, transportation, and studies until August 11th. You’re enthusiastic and ready to pour your energy into your learning pursuits, personal interests, and projects. Watch for impatience with words and movements during this cycle. That said, this can be an excellent time for the motivation to tackle various tasks or a communications project. It’s a time for feeding your need for mental stimulation, ideally without overdoing it. You're in a more connected, mentally engaged, can-do cycle. Also today, interactions flow more smoothly. You can feel a little friendlier, more connected, and more hopeful. You're seeking ways to shine your light and share your ideas, love, and creations.

Lending an ear can help boost a connection today, dear Taurus. It's a good time for negotiations with family or about home and family matters. Also today, Mars leaves your sign and enters your resources sector, and until August 11th, you can be committed to settling in or building upon what you have. This new Mars transit stirs a stronger interest in your material needs and wants–you have more courage or drive to pursue these things. It’s time to focus on what makes you feel secure and ways to achieve more comfort, familiarity, and security. On a different level, you might work on self-esteem issues and build confidence in your value or worth. Impulsive spending is a possibility, but this can also be a time of increased ambition or practical accomplishments. You can be particularly protective of your things, ideas, and personal space. Certainly, if people have overstepped or taken advantage of you, you might manage this now.

Curiosity and an open, willing mind can lead to new interests, avenues of exploration, or connections now, dear Gemini. Mars enters your sign today, and until August 11th, this transit animates your life. You're more active and involved. There have been important discoveries about your inner world and unfinished business in recent weeks, but it hasn’t been straightforward to release these things. Now that Mars is in Gemini, you seem to have more fire and dynamism to draw upon and express. If there aren’t clear channels, you’ll make them! It’s a busy, dynamic, and resourceful time. The weeks ahead are also strong for attracting friendships.

Mars moves into your privacy sector today, dear Cancer, and in the weeks ahead, you're more inclined to take things easy or reflect before jumping into action. It's a powerful time to bring a project or cycle to a close. This transit will last until August 11th, when it will start its tour of your sign. The weeks ahead are strong for reflection, taking action on private matters, and recognizing previously buried frustrations that have been operating just under the surface. You may feel as if you’ve reached a point of overload and now need to take some time to recoup your energy. It’s a good time to process, digest, and understand. You can experience unusual but compelling attractions and desires if you’ve been out of touch with your inner self. You tend to channel more of your energy into private matters during this cycle. Today feels cooperative. You're in a good position to handle money and spending.

Your creativity and skills are highlighted today, dear Leo, and you feel much more at ease and comfortable with others. Mars moves into your sector of friends, hopes, and wishes today, where it will transit until August 11th, and your social life animates. The weeks ahead are strong for feeling more connected and in charge, as well as engaged and involved. This Mars transit brings smoother energy for moving your plans forward and pursuing what you want. It can be a pleasantly busy period ahead when you’re in demand socially or a time when you’re especially motivated to build long-term plans. Even so, if there has been tension building with a friend, it can boil over during this cycle. You can be very active with planting seeds for future projects or experimenting with your many options. This transit can stir a desire to oversee and organize projects. Your desire for the freedom to be yourself and express yourself authentically is strong.

Mars moves to the top of your solar chart today, dear Virgo, firing up your ambitions in the weeks ahead. You'll be more motivated to set goals or work toward your objectives during this cycle, which lasts until August 11th. This transit stirs your ambitions and drive, and it also stimulates a need for action. If you’ve been sitting on your hands regarding a pursuit, this is the time to get moving. Impulsive moves and conflicts with authority may be problem areas, mind you, but it’s otherwise a good time to tap into your need for clear goals, gentle challenges, and exciting plans. It’s an innovative, self-starting period when you’re inclined to take the initiative. Today, your exchanges can be quite fruitful and nurturing. There is a stronger emphasis on the intellectual side of your relationships.

You enjoy getting back on track with your daily routines today, dear Libra. People are more supportive and might offer to lend a hand in a significant way. Also today, Mars moves into your sector of higher thinking, learning, and spirited activities, where it will transit until August 11th. You're embarking on a pleasant cycle for pursuing your goals, especially the ones that brighten and animate your life experience. You are subtly more confident, outgoing, braver, more courageous, and less inhibited. Healthy competition can figure strongly now, and you can be gently challenging yourself to improve as you seek experiences that enhance your sense of well-being or engagement with the world around you. Relationships benefit from some shared fun, non-routine, or new activities and approaches.

You feel a little freer to express yourself today, dear Scorpio, and others appreciate interacting with this side of you. Fluid energy is with you for work, money ideas, and practical matters. Also today, Mars moves into your solar eighth house for a stay until August 11th. Mars brings much energy, heat, and desire to your intimate world in the weeks ahead. Watch for the magnification of problem areas, particularly related to suspicion. While this transit can stir up power and sharing issues, sometimes in challenging ways, you can choose to use this time constructively. You might resolve problem areas in your relationships and develop plans and strategies to achieve your goals. This can be a deep, passionate time when you’re particularly courageous about dealing with your inner demons and the trickier elements of your life that tie you in unhealthy ways to people and things.

Joining creative forces can be most welcome and quite successful and satisfying today, dear Sagittarius. You're ready to apply what you've learned. Also today, Mars moves into your opposite sign, where it will transit until August 11th. It's an animated, energized, passionate, and sometimes problematic transit for close relationships. Problems that have been brewing under the surface of things with others may now emerge, and it’s time to confront them. However, it’s through others that you’re learning the most about yourself during this cycle. There can be a lot of activity in the relationship department or in your social life. Instead, this can be a time for particularly significant negotiation or counseling sessions. It’s important to be active with a partner or to channel excess energy well during this period.

There is an inclination to analyze or go over the past today, dear Capricorn, particularly about or with family. What others say can inspire and touch you. Also today, Mars moves into your work and health sector, and will continue to transit this area of your solar chart, energizing these life departments, until August 11th. Daily life may speed up and might sometimes be a little chaotic without careful management. You could deal with a larger workload, or this transit is about wanting to do more. With energy channeled well, you can get quite a bit done in the weeks ahead. Setting your own pace, if possible, can be most successful. This transit brings heaps of motivation and energy for work, chores, or routines.

The platonic or intellectual side of your relationships assumes greater importance to you today, dear Aquarius, and it's an excellent time for new insights. Your kind gestures can help you get closer to someone, at least in spirit. Also today, Mars moves into harmony with your sign for a transit that lasts until August 11th. It’s an especially active period for romance, entertainment, personal appeal, or the pursuit of pleasure and hobbies. There is always the possibility of raised passions, conflict, impatience, and impulsiveness with Mars, but it can be an enthusiastic and courageous period when you channel these energies well. Your love life may pick up pace, or you can be pouring extra energy into heartfelt projects. Overall, this is a smoother cycle that encourages easier, more natural self-assertion. It can be a good time for physical activity and competition, in general. You are bound to put more energy into pleasure and play in the weeks ahead.

You instinctively understand that sustained effort has its payoffs today, dear Pisces. Healing techniques for both mind and body can be discovered or successfully employed. You find it easier to relax when your relationships are cooperative. Also today, Mars enters your home and family sector, and in the weeks ahead, this transit emphasizes the need to recharge your energy. It’s an active cycle for getting things done on the home front. Excess energy in your home and family sector can sometimes stir up conflict during this cycle that lasts until August 11th. Still, it’s useful for bringing problem areas out into the open. It’s a strong period to take charge of your personal life and make improvements. While it’s not always straightforward to assert yourself in a general sense during this cycle, obstacles can also serve to motivate you.
